projects.name: smart-vineyard-monitoring
projects.title: Smart Vineyard Monitoring System
projects.description: Development and deployment of an integrated IoT sensor network for real-time monitoring of microclimatic conditions, soil moisture, and plant stress indicators across experimental vineyards in the Campania region.
highlights: Deployed 45+ environmental sensors across 3 experimental sites
Developed automated alert system for irrigation management

projects.name: soil-spectral-library
projects.title: Regional Soil Spectral Library
projects.description: Creation of a comprehensive spectral database for Campanian agricultural soils using FTIR and NIR spectroscopy, enabling rapid soil characterisation and reducing the need for traditional wet chemistry analyses.
highlights: Catalogued 800+ soil samples with full spectral profiles
Developed PLS regression models with R² > 0.92 for key parameters
Reduced analysis time by 70% compared to traditional methods

projects.name: olive-phenotyping-platform
projects.title: High-Throughput Olive Phenotyping
projects.description: Implementation of automated image analysis pipeline for phenotypic characterisation of olive cultivars, supporting breeding programmes and germplasm conservation efforts.
highlights: Processed 15,000+ plant images with automated feature extraction
Trained CNN model for disease symptom detection (94% accuracy)
Integrated with departmental LIMS for streamlined data management

projects.name: agricultural-ghg-monitoring
projects.title: Agricultural GHG Emissions Monitoring
projects.description: Establishment of continuous greenhouse gas monitoring infrastructure for quantifying carbon and nitrogen fluxes in Mediterranean agroecosystems under different management practices.
highlights: Installed and maintained 2 eddy covariance towers
Established standardised protocols for flux data processing
Data contributed to European ICOS network

projects.name: agraria-lims
projects.title: Laboratory Information Management System
projects.description: Design and implementation of a custom LIMS solution for the department's analytical laboratories, improving sample tracking, data integrity, and regulatory compliance.
highlights: Automated reporting reduced administrative workload by 40%
Full audit trail for ISO 17025 compliance
